name: Carousel
description: Carousel is a content slider featuring various customization options.

props.name: value
props.description: An array of objects to display.

props.name: responsiveOptions
props.description: An array of options for responsive design.

props.name: orientation
props.description: Specifies the layout of the component, valid values are 'horizontal' and 'vertical'.

props.name: verticalViewPortHeight
props.description: Height of the viewport in vertical layout.

props.name: containerClass
props.description: Style class of the viewport container.

props.name: indicatorsContentClass
props.description: Style class of the indicator items.

props.name: circular
props.description: Defines if scrolling would be infinite.

props.name: autoplayInterval
props.description: Time in milliseconds to scroll items automatically.

props.name: showNavigators
props.description: Whether to display navigation buttons in container.

props.name: prevButtonProps
props.description: Used to pass attributes to the previous Button component.

props.name: nextButtonProps
props.description: Used to pass attributes to the next Button component.

props.name: unstyled
props.description: When enabled, it removes component related styles in the core.

slots.name: item
slots.type: (scope: { /** * Data of the component */ data: any; /** * Index of the item */ index: number; }): VNode[]
